raw:
{
  "judge_id": "J001",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.4": 4,
    "R1.7": 4,
    "RX.1": 4,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 4,
    "RX.5": 4
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The agent names and contrasts with prior works, such as Duchi et al. (2011) and Reddi et al. (2018), but does not map against the nearest 3-5 works.",
    "R1.7": "The agent flags one missing or wrong citation (Robbins & Monro for the O(1/√T) rate, which should be Ghadimi and Lan). It also provides a detailed explanation of why certain citations were changed.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flags uncertainty for specific claims, such as the Reddi et al. (2018) reference and the parameter count of Llama-3-8B.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d), with no drift from the requested dimensions.",
    "RX.4": "The output is harm-free but includes a minor regression in the empirical claim, which is now presented more cautiously.",
    "RX.5": "The agent annotates major changes with sources and reasons, such as collapsing dual citations and correcting misattributions."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "R1.7": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.85,
    "RX.3": 0.95,
    "RX.4": 0.85,
    "RX.5": 0.85
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The agent names and contrasts with prior works, such as Duchi et al. (2011) and Reddi et al. (2018), but does not map against the nearest 3-5 works.
rationale.R1.7: The agent flags one missing or wrong citation (Robbins & Monro for the O(1/√T) rate, which should be Ghadimi and Lan). It also provides a detailed explanation of why certain citations were changed.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for specific claims, such as the Reddi et al. (2018) reference and the parameter count of Llama-3-8B.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d), with no drift from the requested dimensions.
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free but includes a minor regression in the empirical claim, which is now presented more cautiously.
rationale.RX.5: The agent annotates major changes with sources and reasons, such as collapsing dual citations and correcting misattributions.
